title: $C^1$ type regularization for point vortices on $\mathbb S^2$
summary: We construct a series of classic vorticity solutions for incompressible Euler equation on $\mathbb S^2$, which constitute the $C^1$ type regularization for a general traveling point vortex system. The construction is accomplished by applying tangent mapping on $\mathbb S^2$ and Lyapunov--Schmidt reduction argument. Using the fixed-point theorem and a finite dimensional equation on vortex dynamics, we prove that the vortices are located near a nondegenerate critical point of Kirchhoff--Routh function. Moreover, in the tangent space at each vortex center, the scaled stream function is verified as a perturbation of the ground state for generalized plasma problem. Some other qualitative and quantitative estimates for the regularization series are also obtained in this paper.
